candidate.name: Broken fixture: a 0.2 report with no classification

summary.headline: Deliberately broken fixture: report_schema_version 0.2 without candidate.classification. At 0.2 the Step-0 categorization is recorded as a matter of course — its absence means the evaluate flow skipped the gate. report-fixtures-lint MUST flag this (exit 1).

findings.rationale: Fixture filler so the findings array is otherwise valid.
